news.headline: Gas supply to Quetta, other parts of Balochistan suspended
news.summary:
<p>QUETTA: Gas supply to various parts of provincial capital and some districts of Balochistan was suspended on Monday night after unidentified armed men blew up the main gas pipeline at Western Bypass area.</p>
